note: Token-lean roster: world-agent (Keeper) resolves in-carriage actions + tick/events inline and routes to just two specialists — character-agent (NPC minds) and referee (all CoC dice: skill / combat / SAN). Down from 7 agents; per-turn specialist spawns drop from up to 6 to 0-2.

agents.name: Keeper (Orchestrator)
agents.role: Layer 1 — 主控调度器 / 车厢与 tick 内联 / 散文叙述
agents.description: 读取 run_state.json，内联处理车厢内动作(导航/探索/拾取/谜题)与 tick 时钟+环境/剧情事件；只路由对话给 character-agent、骰子给 referee；合并结构化返回，写入 location + lore + meta + flags + inventory，按 narrative.md 输出第二人称散文。

agents.name: Character Mind
agents.role: Layer 2 — 单 NPC 心智 / 对话 / 反应
agents.description: 被召唤为某一个具名 NPC，从该 NPC 私密视角说话 / 行动 / 隐藏信息。返回 speaks + actions + inner_monologue + state_delta + withholds。绝不替别的 NPC 发言，绝不写场景全景。

agents.name: Referee (CoC 7e)
agents.role: Layer 2 — 统一 CoC 7e 判定(技能 / 战斗 / SAN)
agents.description: 单一规则裁判。check_type 分派:skill(1d100≤skill,Regular/Hard/Extreme,push/fumble/bonus&penalty/affliction 降阶)、combat(per-exchange opposed d100,伤害骰,major wound,uncanny→san_rider,HP0→pending_dispersal)、san(roll-under SAN + pass/fail loss,临时/不定性疯狂,Cthulhu Mythos,SAN0→pending_dispersal)。读对应 rules 文件,返回 ruling JSON,绝不写散文。合并了原 rules-referee + combat-referee + sanity-keeper。Temp 0.2。
